/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libouster_srvs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libouster_srvs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/ouster_srvs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/ouster_srvs/srv/detail/get_config__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/ouster_srvs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/ouster_srvs/srv/detail/set_config__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/ouster_srvs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/ouster_srvs/srv/detail/get_metadata__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/foxy/lib: /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
